payload.answer: Reject the proposed memory update. "Sara is Daniele's niece" directly conflicts with the existing memory "Sara is Daniele's daughter." Do not overwrite or store the new claim as current without strong evidence or explicit correction of the prior fact.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution issue to perform; the proposed relationship directly conflicts with an existing durable fact about the same entities.

details: Validated proposed update against existing memory.
Detected a direct contradiction on the relationship between Sara and Daniele.
Blocked high-confidence overwrite of an existing durable fact.
No new durable memory card committed.

repair_options: Request clarification or evidence to determine whether the prior memory was incorrect.
If the user intended a correction, mark the old fact as superseded only with explicit confirmation and provenance.
If ambiguity must be preserved, store the new claim only as an unverified conflicting report, not as current durable memory.
